title: Dekton Folding Step Stool-Space Saving Foldable| Non-slip Surface And Feet| 150kg Max Load Capacity| Durable & Sturdy Plastic Construction| Ideal For Home,Office and Kids| Compact & Lightweight Design
features: Space-Saving Design: The Dekton Folding Step Stool features a foldable design that easily collapses to a compact size for effortless storage. Ideal for homes with limited space, it provides a convenient solution for reaching high shelves or cabinets without taking up valuable room.

Non-Slip Surface & Feet: Designed with safety in mind, this step stool comes equipped with a non-slip surface and anti-slip feet. The textured surface ensures a secure footing, while the rubberized feet prevent the stool from sliding or scratching floors, making it perfect for use in any room of the house.

Impressive Load Capacity: Built to handle everyday tasks with ease, the Dekton step stool boasts a robust maximum load capacity of 150kg. This durable stool is engineered to support a variety of users and tasks, providing reliable stability and strength for all your stepping needs.

Durable & Sturdy Construction: Crafted from high-quality plastic, the Dekton step stool is both durable and sturdy. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting performance, while its lightweight nature makes it easy to carry and reposition around your home.

Ideal for Home Use: Whether you need extra height for reaching kitchen cabinets, changing light bulbs, or other household tasks, the Dekton Print Step Stool is the perfect addition to your home. Its practical design and stylish appearance make it a versatile tool that combines convenience with visual appeal.
description: Introducing the Dekton Print Step Stool—where functionality meets flair in a compact, space-saving design. Perfect for any home, this foldable step stool is a versatile addition to your household, designed to combine practicality with style. Its striking pattern adds a touch of modern elegance to any room, while its durable plastic construction ensures longevity and robustness for daily use. Built to handle up to 150kg, this step stool provides a reliable solution for reaching high shelves, cabinets, or for use in various tasks around the house. The non-slip surface and feet guarantee safety and stability, reducing the risk of slips and accidents, making it a dependable choice for both adults and children. Its lightweight, foldable design allows for easy storage and transport, making it ideal for small spaces where storage is a concern. The Dekton step stool is not only a practical tool but also a stylish accessory that complements any decor. Whether you’re changing a lightbulb, accessing high kitchen cabinets, or just need a little extra height for various tasks, this stool is designed to meet your needs with elegance and ease. Invest in this step stool to add convenience and a touch of chic to your home, all while ensuring that safety and durability are at the forefront of your daily tasks. This unique design not only enhances the aesthetic appeal of your space but also complements various home decor styles, blending functionality with fashionable design.
